entry.title: Re: SAP Document Compliance solution for Greek myDATA e-books, Part 2 – central objects in customiza
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for the documentation.

I am facing a issue wherein foreign user does edoc_cockpit for invoice, the name, address still appears in greek language. I checked in ADRC table two version of address number is there: one in english and other in greece. So, for foreign customer it should pick english one right?

What could be the possible issue here? Please guide.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Reporting on completed workflows
entry.content: Edit: Double-post.

entry.title: Re: Reporting on completed workflows
entry.content: Thanks a lot, I will check it out. Do you know if this is also available through Odata API? I've tried to find it, but have had no luck so far. Tried to dig through all the wf* api endpoints and could not yet identify a good way to get approvers (and time/date of approval) of workflow participents for a given MDF object. My need is to archive MDF objects, and for that I need to also include who approved each step, at what date.

entry.title: Data Action: Copying user-submitted data to another version and lock only that user's cost center
entry.content:
Use case: Multiple users plan on the same input form but have data access restricted to their own cost centers. After planning, each user should trigger a data action that:

  1. Copies their entered values to a public version (e.g., version 'K')

  2. Locks their specific cost center so that they can no longer modify it

  3. Leaves all other users' cost centers unlocked so they can still plan and trigger their own data actions

How can I structure a data action and locking logic in SAC to support this partial locking mechanism by user and cost center?

entry.title: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.4
entry.content:
Preliminary versions of What’s New information and of the Product Assistance are now available for customers and partners to get a preview on the upcoming new and changed features of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.4.

You can find this preview on the current Help Portal page SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (see What’s New section “Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition2502.4”). To access the Preliminary What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer or the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The RASD tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The preliminary information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.4 will be available in RASD within the next few days. We recommend using RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you. A valid S-User ID is needed to use the RASD tool and to view all the preliminary content stated above.

For any feedback you may have, try the Commenting Feature for What's New documentation in this release. See this blog for more information.

entry.title: SAP Signavio Process Insights filters
entry.content: We are looking into use cases where we want to filter vendor and or customer codes in Process Insights. We are unable to find those in the available filters and we are wondering how we can find them. For example, in a demo we see that an available filter for the vendors is 'invoicing party' however, in Process Insights we cannot find it. Is this filter available to all? Any ideas of where we can look?

entry.content: How to solve this error

entry.title: Re: ISD-Input service distributor for distributing GST to multiple business places - In S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hello Shiva,
To maintain turnover details for multiple company code use table  J_1IG_ISD_TN_V

Regards,
Amit

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
First I don't understand why keep redesigning so often. Second if the site needs a tutorial to teach people how well it is designed and how great it is then in fact the site is rubbish.

I did not find much changes or anything soothing to eyes it is well okayish like it was before. But as days are passing by finding simple things take ton of time that is the chief complaint.

entry.title: Business application studio: DevSpace stucks in "Starting", Timeout
entry.content:
Hello All, 

my DevSpace stucks in "Starting" phase and runs in a timeout after a while. I think it's because its bigger than 6GB. 

I really need the data from this space. I tried a lot of stuff (start/stop, invisible mode, refresh cache etc.), but nothing works. 

Can someone support?

Thanks.

KR

Bettina

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
@Prasenjitsbist one important reason for the redesign is compliance with EU's Accessibility Act/European law which goes into effect this month.
The Accessibility directive is part of EU's "Strategy for the rights of persons with disabilities 2021-2030". 

Which tutorial are you referring to? If you mean the Community tutorial for new users, this is not new and has been around for many years, and several platforms already.

entry.title: Does Event Reasons/Actions supports Manual Document Generation?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I understand that Using Event Reasons/Actions in business rules is not feasible/supported for AUTOMATIC Document Generation as per the below KBA;
https://me.sap.com/notes/0002628604 

But, Is it same for MANUAL Document Generation ? Does Event Reasons/Actions using business rules supports Manual Document Generation?

Thanks in Advance.

 

Regards,

P Shubham

Dolores

entry.title: Instance Memory in ABAP for Cloud Development
entry.content:
I have not been able to find a way to retain Static Class attributes in instance memory between SAPUI5 apps and the ABAP backend. We're currently on a S/4 HANA on-premise 2023 FSP 02 system. On each call to the ABAP backend from SAPUI5, all of my static class attributes are cleared. Nothing is kept in ABAP memory between calls the ABAP backend from my UI5 apps. 

How can we retain ABAP class instances in memory while re-designing our UI to run on SAPUI5? I hope that I am missing a setting to keep an ABAP internal session memory alive. If not, this is a really big issue for partners and customers that cannot leverage there instanciated instances without having to rebuild from the DB on every call to the ABAP Server. SAPUI5 apps need to be able to leverage instantiated classes in the ABAP server.

oData services have become the primary bridge between frontend and backend apps. However, OData can't support ABAP object references, so we need to get a little more creative on how to make the two technologies work together:

Attempt 1 - Custom CDS entities + ABAP data store. Here we set up a data store as a singleon to try to take advantage of static attribute - FAILED

class ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE definition
  public
  final
  create public .

public section.

  class-methods GET_OBJECT
    returning
      value(RO_DATA_STORE) type ref to ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE .
  methods GET_FOO_OBJECT
    returning
      value(RO_FOO) type ref to ZCL_FOO.
  methods SET_FOO_OBJECT
    importing
      !IO_FOO type ref to ZCL_FOO .
  METHODS get_count
      RETURNING
        VALUE(rv_count) TYPE int4.
    METHODS set_count
      IMPORTING
        iv_count TYPE int4.
  PROTECTED SECTION.
private section.

  class-data MO_DATA_STORE type ref to ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE .
  DATA MO_FOO type ref to ZCL_FOO .
  DATA mv_count TYPE int4.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD get_object.
    IF zcl_le_data_store=>mo_data_store IS NOT BOUND.
      CREATE OBJECT zcl_le_data_store=>mo_data_store.
    ENDIF.
    ro_data_store = zcl_le_data_store=>mo_data_store.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD get_count.
    rv_count = mv_count.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD set_count.
    mv_count = iv_count.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD GET_FOO_OBJECT.
    ro_foo = mo_foo.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD SET_FOO_OBJECT.
    mo_foo = io_foo.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.
    TRY.
        DATA(lo_data_store) = zcl_le_data_store=>get_object(  ).
        DATA(lv_count) = lo_data_store->get_count(  ).
        lv_count += 1.
        lo_data_store->set_count( lv_count ).

        "Required calls for if_rap_query_provider interface usage
        DATA(lv_top)     = io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ).
        DATA(lv_skip)    = io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ).
        DATA(lt_fields)  = io_request->get_requested_elements( ).
        DATA(lt_sort)    = io_request->get_sort_elements( ).

        DATA(lt_filter_conds) = io_request->get_filter( )->get_as_ranges( ). "       get_filter_conditions( ).
        DATA lt_data TYPE ty_web_api_t.
        io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_data ) ).
        io_response->set_data( lt_data ).

      CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(exception).
        DATA(exception_message) = cl_message_helper=>get_latest_t100_exception( exception )->if_message~get_longtext( ).
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.

The get data store method is returning an unbound instance on each call to if_rap_query_provider.

 

Attempt 2 - ABAP Push Channels - FAILED

I extended Gregor's ABAP push channel example to allow PCP messaging between the SAPUI5 app and the ABAP server. Unfortanately,  the data store static attributes do not retain instance memory over ABAP message Channels. The results are the same as attempt #1.

To add insult to injury, when moving this approach from Z-space to a ABAP Cloud, SAP ABAP Messaging Channel Application (t-code SAPC) are not supported in ABAP Cloud. I created another Tech Q&A post on this specific issue here.
  

 

 

CLASS zcl_apc_wsp_ext_zapc_echo DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  INHERITING FROM cl_apc_wsp_ext_stateless_pcp_b
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_message
        REDEFINITION .
    METHODS if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_start
        REDEFINITION .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
private section.

  class-methods PREPARE_MESSAGE_FOR_UI
    importing
      !IV_TEXT type STRING
    returning
      value(RV_TEXT) type STRING .

ENDCLASS.



CLASS ZCL_APC_WSP_EXT_ZAPC_ECHO IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_message.
    DATA: lo_producer TYPE REF TO cl_amc_message_type_pcp.
    DATA: lt_fields          TYPE pcp_fields.
    DATA lt_foo TYPE zcl_foo=>ty_fo_tab.

    TRY.
*       retrieve the text message
        i_message->get_fields( CHANGING c_fields = lt_fields ).
        lo_producer ?= cl_amc_channel_manager=>create_message_producer(
          i_application_id = 'ZAMC_ECHO'
          i_channel_id     = '/echo' ).

        DATA lo_foo TYPE REF TO zcl_foo.

        READ TABLE lt_fields INTO DATA(ls_foo_guid) WITH KEY name = 'foo_guid'.
        IF sy-subrc NE 0.
          "Raise exception
        ENDIF.




        """""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""
        TRY.
            READ TABLE lt_fields INTO DATA(ls_fields) WITH KEY name = 'operation'.
            DATA(lv_message) = i_message->get_text( ).
            data lo_data_store TYPE REF TO zcl_le_data_store.
            lo_foo = zcl_le_data_store=>get_foo_object( ).
            IF lo_foo IS NOT BOUND.
                "Object memory not working, rebuild from DB :(
                lo_foo = zcl_foo_factory=>find_or_create( ls_doc_guid-value ).
            ENDIF.
            CASE ls_fields-value.
              WHEN 'update_foo'.
                lo_foo->_service( lv_message ).
                "lo_foo->save( i_commit = 'X' ).
              WHEN 'handle_save_and_commit'.
                lo_foo->save( i_commit = 'X' ).
              WHEN OTHERS.

            ENDCASE.

          CATCH cx_root.
            "Raise exception
        ENDTRY.
        """""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""


        DATA(lv_text) = prepare_message_for_ui( 'Success' ).
        DATA(lo_msg) = cl_ac_message_type_pcp=>create( ).
        lo_msg->set_text( i_message = lv_text ).
        LOOP AT lt_fields INTO DATA(ls_field).
          IF ls_field-name NP 'pcp-*'.
            lo_msg->set_field( i_name = ls_field-name i_value = ls_field-value ).
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.

        lo_producer->send( i_message = lo_msg ).
      CATCH cx_ac_message_type_pcp_error INTO DATA(lx_pcp_error).
        MESSAGE lx_pcp_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
      CATCH cx_amc_error INTO DATA(lx_amc_error).
        MESSAGE lx_amc_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
      CATCH cx_apc_error INTO DATA(lx_apc_error).
        MESSAGE lx_apc_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
      CATCH /coss/cx_api_hub INTO DATA(lx_api_hub).
        MESSAGE lx_api_hub->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_start.
    TRY.
* bind the WebSocket connection to the AMC channel
        DATA(lo_binding) = i_context->get_binding_manager( ).
        lo_binding->bind_amc_message_consumer(
          i_application_id = 'ZAMC_ECHO'
          i_channel_id     = '/echo' ).
      CATCH cx_apc_error INTO DATA(lx_apc_error).
        DATA(lv_message) = lx_apc_error->get_text( ).
        MESSAGE lx_apc_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD prepare_message_for_ui.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF t_message,
             text TYPE string,
             user TYPE uname,
             date TYPE timestamp,
           END OF t_message.
    DATA: ls_message TYPE t_message.
    ls_message-text = iv_text.
    ls_message-user = sy-uname.
    GET TIME STAMP FIELD ls_message-date.
    DATA(lo_json_witer) = cl_sxml_string_writer=>create(
                            type = if_sxml=>co_xt_json
                          ).
    CALL TRANSFORMATION id SOURCE ls_message = ls_message
                        RESULT XML lo_json_witer.
    DATA(lv_xstr) = lo_json_witer->get_output( ).
    CALL FUNCTION 'ECATT_CONV_XSTRING_TO_STRING'
      EXPORTING
        im_xstring = lv_xstr
*       im_encoding = 'UTF-8'
      IMPORTING
        ex_string  = rv_text.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

Attempt 3 - ABAP Daemons could be used in combination with any approach that allows communication between SAPUI5 & the ABAP backend and should be able to set and retrieve instanciated objects as a Static Attribute. However, The ABAP dependency (CL_ABAP_DAEMON_EXT_BASE) to make use of ABAP Daemons is also not released for use an ABAP Cloud.

Attempt 4 - ABAP Shared memory to the rescue?  NOPE, This approach can also be used in any combination of SAPUI5 <-> ABAP Cloud communication. Similarly, the ABAP dependencies to make use of this approach are also not released for ABAP Cloud usage (CL_SHM_AREA, if_shm_build_instance & transaction SHMA objects). While this approach does work in non ABAP Cloud, a limitation I came accross is the "cx_shm_external_reference" exception which prevents you from setting an instance ref to shared memory if it has creates references to other objects. For our case of an object with many other nestest instances, this approach is not workable.

After quite some research and failed attempts... getting SAPUI5 and ABAP Cloud to work together is challenging. I think we need something like ABAP Events + SAPUI5's EventBus to communicate or a ABAP Cloud based way to use ABAP Push channels. Currently migrating to clean core with the available tools of our on-prem system feels like trying to fit a square peg into a circlular hole 😪.

ps. I am running my freestyle SAPUI5 apps on Business application studio & deploying it to the ABAP Application server. In both scenerios there is not a clear way to utilize my existing ABAP classes are part of our clean core add-on.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

 

 

 

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Goods Movement bin not determined or entered
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I have the following problem within SAP DM and cannot post a goods receipt in SAP DM: 

The request Payload in detail: 
<ewmGoodsReceiptRequest>
<ewmProgramId>DEV100</ewmProgramId>
<ewmDestination>DEVCLNT100</ewmDestination>
<orderNumber>1000284</orderNumber>
<plant>DM01</plant>
<warehouseNumber>D01</warehouseNumber>
<itemList>
<item>
<material>DUMMY_WE</material>
<packingMaterial>VERPACKUNG_NEU</packingMaterial>
<lineId>0000000001</lineId>
<quantity>1.0</quantity>
<handlingUnitNumber/>
<orderItemNumber>0001</orderItemNumber>
<batchNumber/>
<unitOfMeasure>EA</unitOfMeasure>
<isoUnitOfMeasure/>
<manufacturingDateTime/>
<storageLocation>101E</storageLocation>
<expiryDate/>
<additionalParameters/>
<reservation/>
<reservationItem/>
</item>
</itemList>
<wipIdentifierList>
<wipIdentifier>
<lineId>0000000001</lineId>
<serialNumber/>
<sfc>DM0132</sfc>
<externalSerialNumber/>
<quantity>1</quantity>
</wipIdentifier>
</wipIdentifierList>
<additionalParameters/>
<packingContainerNumber>DM01PU4</packingContainerNumber>
</ewmGoodsReceiptRequest>

Best regards

entry.title: CDC and Drupal integration - jwt token issue
entry.content:
There is an integration between CDC and Drupal where the authentication method configured on the Drupal side is UIDSignature(User/Secret key pair) and from Drupal side id_tokens are arriving.
Since the authentication method selected on the Drupal side is User/Secret key pair, then even if a JWT token is sent from CDC to Drupal, the module will always ignore it because the authentication method is User/Secret key pair and does not use these tokens.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CDC and Drupal integration - jwt token issue
entry.content:
Drupal integration require usage of userkey/secret key as authentication: Drupal 7

Further usage of toke is explained here: Install required Drupal Modules

where token is provided from Drupal.

entry.title: Condition contracts - vendor rebates
entry.content: Hi, we are implementing CCM with vendor rebates. We need the final settlement to be posted to the GL account, not the vendor subledger (reconciliation) account. This is because we need to wait for the vendor invoice before posting it. Is this possible?

entry.title: Anyone Successfully Using SAP Desktop Agent on Mac?
entry.content: Can anyone confirm if the SAP Desktop Agent is available for Mac and whether it works properly? I remember there were some issues with installing it on Mac earlier. If anyone is currently using it on a Mac, could you please share your experience—specifically, whether it's functioning smoothly or not?

entry.title: DataSource.setRefreshPaused API doesnt work for Calculated Measures with Script Variables
entry.content:
Hi,

I got a table with a Calculated Measure with a Script Variable (number). The Table is set to RefreshPaused(false), but it still is beeing initialized/loading from startup with a visible loading sign. If i remove the Script Variable in the Calculated Measure, the table has no loading sign. Is it possible to Paused also Calculated Measures with Script Variables completely?

thx

entry.title: Re: Output window shows no information in Visual Studio Extension - release 2505
entry.content:
Hello Kostadin,

Are you getting any messages at all like "debugger started"? I do think a case would be needed with AP-RC-BDS-DBG to verify this behaviour.

- Cian

entry.title: Re: Vendor code in FBL3N for GR/IR Clearing A/C
entry.content:
Hi Did you get the solution; we have similar requirement.

We are currently working on a requirement to enhance the FBL3N report by populating values for fields such as LIFNR and EBELN.

During our analysis and after reviewing several SAP Community blogs, we found that BTE 00001650 is a viable solution for this enhancement. However, we have encountered the following issues:

  1. The standard structure RFPOSXEXT already contains the fields U_LIFNR and U_EBELN. But upon debugging BTE 00001650, we observed that these fields are not present in the internal tables I_POSTAB and E_POSTAB.

  2. To overcome this, we appended the required fields to the structures RFPOS and RFPOSX and then executed the report RFPOSXEXTEND. As a result, the structure RFPOSXEXT was updated correctly, and we were able to populate LIFNR and EBELN in the BTE logic, which were displayed as additional columns in the FBL3N output.

     

  3. Our main requirement is to populate these values specifically for documents with type 'RE', where currently these fields appear blank.

  4. We would like to confirm whether it is technically possible to populate values in the existing standard fields U_LIFNR and U_EBELN instead of creating and using new custom fields for this purpose.

  5. We have these two fields in Setting->Special Fields.

     

     

We would appreciate your guidance or suggestions on how best to

handle this scenario.

entry.title: CacheBuddy Custom Widget: Local Storage Integration for SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
The CacheBuddy custom widget for SAP Analytics Cloud is designed to offer powerful client-side data caching by utilizing the browser's cache memory feature. It provides a well-structured and type-safe API for storing data persistently, retrieving it efficiently, and managing a variety of data types, including numbers, strings, booleans, objects, and arrays.

One of the key features of CacheBuddy is its ability to maintain data persistence across different browser sessions and closures. Unlike session-based caching, CacheBuddy keeps cached data available until it’s explicitly deleted by the host application or the user. This lasting persistence greatly enhances application performance and responsiveness by reducing the need for repeated data retrieval from remote backend systems.

CacheBuddy makes it easy to transfer information between different stories within the SAP Analytics Cloud environment. This means that one application (like "Application A") can store a value that another application (like "Application B") can easily access. This design eliminates the need for extra storage services, complex data models, or complicated configurations, making data communication between various analytical applications straightforward and efficient.

Features and Advantages

Key Features:
  • Type-Specific Data Management: Offers dedicated methods for storing and retrieving specific data types (number, string, boolean, object, array), ensuring data integrity and simplifying development.
  • Persistent Storage: Data is stored in localStorage, guaranteeing persistence across browser sessions, tabs, and closures until explicitly deleted by the application or user action.
  • Cache Utility Functions: Includes methods to check for the existence of cached items, delete individual entries, or clear all CacheBuddy-managed data.
  • Comprehensive Data Retrieval: The getAllCacheMemory() method allows for the retrieval of all cached data, with automatic type parsing for convenience.
  • Input Validation: Incorporates basic validation for method parameters, providing console feedback for invalid inputs.
  • Optimized Performance: Leverages browser cache memory technology to deliver fast data storage and retrieval.
Advantages:
  • Enhanced Application Performance: By leveraging local data storage, CacheBuddy minimizes repeated server requests, leading to faster data access and a more responsive user experience within SAP Analytics Cloud applications.
  • Reduced Server Load: Decreased reliance on continuous backend data fetching contributes to a lower operational load on SAP Analytics Cloud servers and associated data sources.
  • Streamlined Data Persistence: Provides an intuitive and high-level API for localStorage, simplifying the implementation of client-side data persistence compared to direct cache manipulation.
  • Improved Data Organization: The automatic key prefixing ensures that CacheBuddy's data is distinctly identifiable and managed within the browser's local storage.

Video Tutorial

Cache Memory Management

This document outlines the methods available for managing cached data. These methods allow you to store, retrieve, and manipulate various data types in a temporary cache, improving application performance by reducing the need to re-fetch or re-compute data.

Storing Data in Cache

These methods are used to store different types of data in the cache, each identified by a unique ID. They all return a boolean indicating whether the operation was successful.

  • setNumberCacheMemory(id: string, value: number) - Stores a numerical value.
  • setStringCacheMemory(id: string, value: string) - Stores a string value.
  • setBooleanCacheMemory(id: string, value: boolean) - Stores a boolean value (true or false).
  • setSelectionCacheMemory(id: string, value: Selection) - Stores a non-array JavaScript object as a JSON string.
  • setArrayCacheMemory(id: string, value: String[]) - Stores a JavaScript array as a JSON string.
Retrieving Data from Cache

These methods are used to retrieve previously stored data from the cache using its ID.

  • getNumberCacheMemory(id: string) - Returns the stored number.
  • getStringCacheMemory(id: string) - Returns the stored string.
  • getBooleanCacheMemory(id: string) - Returns the stored boolean.
  • getSelectionCacheMemory(id: string) - Returns the stored selection object.
  • getArrayCacheMemory(id: string) - Retrieves and parses a stored array from the cache.
Managing Cache Entries

These methods provide functionality for checking the existence of, deleting, and retrieving all cache entries.

  • existCacheMemory(id: string) - Returns a boolean indicating whether a cache entry with the specified ID exists.
  • deleteCacheMemory(id: string) - Removes the specific cache entry identified by its ID. Returns a boolean indicating success.
  • deleteAllCacheMemory() - Deletes all entries from the cache. Returns a boolean indicating success.
  • getAllCacheMemory() - Retrieves all items currently in the cache as a single Selection object.

Usage

To get started with CacheBuddy, simply download the CacheBuddy.json file from the link below. Then, just follow the instructions provided to install CacheBuddy in your SAP Analytics Cloud environment.

GitHub Repository: https://github.com/SAP-Custom-Widget/CacheBuddy
Direct Download: https://sap-custom-widget.rohitchouhan.com/?dl=CacheBuddy 

  • Download the CacheBuddy.json.
  • Go to your SAC Portal, select Stories/Analytic Application from the left sidebar, and then go to the Custom Widget tab.
  • Click on the + icon on the right side and select the CacheBuddy.json file that you downloaded.
  • You're done! You can now use it in your app.

Complete Example Code:

// 1. Store a number
var isAgeStored = CacheBuddy_1.setNumberCacheMemory("userAge", 26);
if (isAgeStored) {
    console.log(["User age stored successfully."]);
} else {
    console.log(["Failed to store user age."]);
}

// 2. Retrieve the number
var retrievedAge = CacheBuddy_1.getNumberCacheMemory("userAge");
console.log(["Retrieved age: ", retrievedAge]); // Expected: 30

// 3. Store a string
var isNameStored = CacheBuddy_1.setStringCacheMemory("userName", "Rohit");
console.log(["User name stored: ", isNameStored]); // Expected: true

// 4. Retrieve the string
var retrievedName = CacheBuddy_1.getStringCacheMemory("userName");
console.log(["Retrieved name: ", retrievedName]); // Expected: Rohit

// 5. Store a boolean
var isActiveStored = CacheBuddy_1.setBooleanCacheMemory("userActive", true);
console.log(["User active status stored: ", isActiveStored]); // Expected: true

// 6. Retrieve the boolean
var retrievedActive = CacheBuddy_1.getBooleanCacheMemory("userActive");
console.log(["Retrieved active status: ", retrievedActive]); // Expected: true

// 7. Store a selection (non-array JavaScript object)
var userSelection = {
    "theme": "dark",
    "title": "CacheBuddy"
};
var isSelectionStored = CacheBuddy_1.setSelectionCacheMemory("userSettings", userSelection);
console.log(["User settings stored: ", isSelectionStored]); // Expected: true

// 8. Retrieve the selection
var retrievedSettings = CacheBuddy_1.getSelectionCacheMemory("userSettings");
console.log(["Retrieved settings:", retrievedSettings]); // Expected: { theme: "dark", notifications: true }

// 9. Store an array
var userHobbies = ["coding","writing", "music"];
var isHobbiesStored = CacheBuddy_1.setArrayCacheMemory("userHobbies", userHobbies);
console.log(["User hobbies stored: ", isHobbiesStored]); // Expected: true

// 10. Retrieve the array
var retrievedHobbies = CacheBuddy_1.getArrayCacheMemory("userHobbies");
console.log(["Retrieved hobbies:", retrievedHobbies]); // Expected: ["coding","writing", "music"]

// 11. Check if an entry exists
var doesAgeExist = CacheBuddy_1.existCacheMemory("userAge");
console.log(["Does 'userAge' exist? ", doesAgeExist]); // Expected: true

var doesNonExistentExist = CacheBuddy_1.existCacheMemory("nonExistentKey");
console.log(["Does 'nonExistentKey' exist? ", doesNonExistentExist]); // Expected: false

// 12. Delete a specific cache entry
var isAgeDeleted = CacheBuddy_1.deleteCacheMemory("userAge");
console.log(["User age deleted: ", isAgeDeleted]); // Expected: true

var doesAgeStillExist = CacheBuddy_1.existCacheMemory("userAge");
console.log(["Does 'userAge' exist after deletion? ", doesAgeStillExist]); // Expected: false

// 13. Retrieve all cache entries (after some deletions)
var allCache = CacheBuddy_1.getAllCacheMemory();
console.log(["All current cache entries:", allCache]);
// This will show userName, userActive, userSettings, userHobbies as objects, and userAge will be gone.

// 14. Delete all cache entries
var areAllDeleted = CacheBuddy_1.deleteAllCacheMemory();
console.log(["All cache entries deleted: ", areAllDeleted]); // Expected: true

// 15. Verify all are deleted
var finalAllCache = CacheBuddy_1.getAllCacheMemory();
console.log(["All cache entries after deleteAllCacheMemory:", finalAllCache]); // Expected: {} or an empty Selection object

Conclusion

The CacheBuddy custom widget is a game-changer for SAP Analytics Cloud developers who want to boost application performance and ensure smooth data flow. With its solid, type-safe caching system that uses localStorage, it cuts down on backend calls and makes everything feel more responsive. Plus, its ability to transfer data directly between stories simplifies those complex analytical tasks.

entry.title: ABAP Proxy Transfoms ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,ABAP Proxy Transfoms ABAP Cloud

In S/4HANA On Premise/Private Cloud to transform an abap proxy into xml, and vice versa, we can use the CL_PROXY_XML_TRANSFORM class.

Unfortunately this class is not released for use in the cloud.

Is there a class in S/4HANA Public Cloud, which has the same functionality?

If not, can you suggest an alternative way for the transformation?

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards.

Marco Spera

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content: @xavierlegarrec Thank you for the documentation and the explanation. I opened a ticket for this bug to be fixed and will inform you here accordingly.

entry.title: Next available ID not suggested while creating a enterprise project.
entry.content:
Recently used projects displayed while creating a new project instead of the next available ID being suggested.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Next available ID not suggested while creating a ente...
entry.content:
The Recently Used is a pure UI buffer feature, when a user searches for projects via the project value help, it is buffered and so the next time when the user searches/creates a project, the system will show the recently searched/used ID.

So the default behaviour is, when creating a project and the project ID field is empty. The recently used projects are shown, but once the user starts entering the project ID the next available ID appears.

entry.title: SAP ILM : Custom date (Time Ref) for CA_BUPA
entry.content:
Hello, 

I try to use the solution SAP ILM to archive BP on my system. 

To meet my business needs, I need to base myself on a custom date for a certain type of BP and not on the standard date. I add custom conditions fields on the ILM OBJECT CA_BUPA : COMPANY CODE(KNB1) and GROUPING (BUT000).

 

I create a custom Time Ref CUSTOM_DATE via the BADI BADI_IRM_OT_STT

On method REGISTER_STARTTIME_TYPES

 

On method GET_START_DATE

 

 

But when I use the SAP ILM prog on BP test, I have this error message : 

After debugging, I found that the error comes from the function module BUP_BUPA_EOP_CHECK, which fails during execution.

This function module builds a table called lt_source_fields with various information ( START_RET_DATE, BP Number, BP TYPE, etc ) . Later in the code, a check is performed on this table during the indirect determination loop.

Since my custom condition fields are not present in the table, my Z BAdI is never called, and therefore I cannot continue with the date determination logic.

I believe I'm missing some custom configuration, but I can't figure out what exactly.

I based my implementation on SAP's BC_SFLIGHT example, but I must have missed a setting somewhere.

Do you have any idea what could be wrong?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Mock Server configuration in SAP UI5 Application.
entry.content:
@tribhuwan_pant Indeed, this middleware is so nice and simple to use. I am wondering why it is not mentioned on 

OData V2 Mock Server Tutorial : https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/3a9728ec31f94ca18a7d543ce419d85d

entry.title: Re: Attach technician photo in an email to customer infor...
entry.content:
@priyanka_agg McDVOICE wrote:

Hi Folks, 

I am trying to create a Business rule which will send en email to customer informing them about technician's arrival. 

but i want to attach technician's photo in the email as well . Is this possible and how ?

Regards

Priyanka

Yes, attaching a technician's photo to an email via a business rule is definitely possible! You'll need to store the technician's photos within your business rule system (or a linked system) and ensure they're accessible. When your business rule triggers an email, it will dynamically retrieve the specific technician's photo URL (or the photo itself) and then embed it directly into the email body using an HTML <img> tag. Alternatively, if your system supports it, you could attach it as a separate file. Just remember to optimize image size and consider email client compatibility.

entry.title: Re: How to write a rule to get "Transfer Date" in Documen...
entry.content: Hi Namratha,

entry.title: Re: Actions in SAP Build Process Automation -- Need to ca...
entry.content:
Hi Rohit,

Thank you for looking into this. Please find the requested details below:

1) Destination URL: https://93112af8trial-dev-capproject-srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/interactions-srv

2) Action Project Creation: The Action Project was created in SAP Build Process Automation using the "Build from Scratch" option. No URL prefix was added during creation. I also tried adding a forward slash (/) as the prefix, but that didn’t work.

3) Actions Added: All actions in the project were created manually as Custom Actions.

Please let me know if you need any further information.

Best regards,

Parth

If this is the App to use, how do you activate the objects?

If I understand correctly, I have to use the "Posted Values" tab instead of the "Cumulative Values", right ? 

Also, do I have to use the subledger specific line item type 07203 - Revaluation of Acquisition Costs, Posted Periodically ? 

Thank you for your help,
Regards

Best regards.

Peter

entry.title: Re: How to write a rule to get "Transfer Date" in Documen...

I understand that Using Event Reasons/Actions in business rules is not feasible/supported for AUTOMATIC Document Generation as per the below KBA; https://me.sap.com/notes/0002628604 But, Is it same for MANUAL Document Generation ? Does Event Reasons/Actions using business rules supports Manual Document Generation?

entry.title: Re: Reporting on completed workflows
entry.content: I can use WfRequest to get most of the details it seems, but I have not found a way to get the correct wfRequestId to fetch information from a specific MDF entry's workflow for a user.

entry.title: Should the browser cache the Component-preload.js file in an SAPUI5 application ?
entry.content:
I have a simple SAPUI5 application deployed to SAP S/4HANA.  When I access the application from the Fiori Launchpad, the app works and the Component-preload.js is sent to the browser.  But the Component-preload.js file is sent to the browser all the time even when there is no change to the SAPUI5 application - while this is not a big deal, I just want to know if this the correct behavior.  

In a similar app deployed to SAP BTP, the Component-preload.js is only sent if there is a change to the SAPUI5 application.  Otherwise, the browser reads it from the cache.  I was expecting the same behavior in my app deployed to SAP S/4HANA as well...

entry.title: Re: Which tables does exit in S/4HANA for release strateg...
entry.content:
Dear  RaymondGiuseppi,

Thanks for your reply. I think I should be more precise.

I search for a table or tables, that contains the status of the approval step of the workflow (Register Flexible Workflow) in the purchase order in relation of the purchase order number.

Please can you help me.

Thanks a lot.

Best regards.

Peter

entry.title: Mass deletion of handling units in SAP S/4 Public Coud
entry.content:
In S/4 Public Cloud we need to proceed with the operation of emptying and massively deleting the handling units. We are using the App Create and process unassigned handling units (HU02) but within it it is not possible to select a large number of HU. Since the HU to be emptied and deleted are 50,000, is there a way or an App that allows us to proceed more quickly with the operation? 

We also tried to copy and paste from csv files. but in the App it is possible to paste a few lines at a time

entry.title: Re: API & CDS view for Display Multilevel BoM (S/4HANA Pu...

entry.title: Re: AS ABAP 7.52 SP04, Developer Edition: Concise Installation Guide
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

I apologise for the delay. I have now updated the asset.

Thanks a lot for your continuing support.

Best wishes,

Julie.

entry.title: Re: Calculated Inspection Characteristics using BAPI_INSP...
entry.content:
Hi mouradche

Not sure if you have solved the issue, but I had the same problem and after numerous attempts, I succeeded.

Calling BAPI sequence:
1. BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS
2. BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT (WAIT = X)
3. BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS
4. BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT (WAIT = X)

Details:
1. BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS:
      - CHAR_RESULTS: 0 entries
      - SAMPLE_RESULTS: 35 entries (X in fields CLOSED & EVALUATED)
      - SINGLE_RESULTS: 23 entries (Results in RES_VALUE and calculated char lines are deleted)

3. BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS:
      - CHAR_RESULTS: 0 entries
      - SAMPLE_RESULTS: 35 entries (X in fields CLOSED, EVALUATED & LAST_SMPL)
      - SINGLE_RESULTS: 35 entries (RES_VALUE blank for all)

Inspection point values are the same in both cases, e.g. Date & time

All chars are then recorded, valuated and closed, and the sample/inspection points are in status completed and accepted.

Regards, James

entry.title: Re: API & CDS view for Display Multilevel BoM (S/4HANA Pu...
entry.content: could you please suggest anything else?

entry.title: Re: Vendor code in FBL3N for GR/IR Clearing A/C
entry.content: For standard fields don't use the old BTE, but use BAdI FI_ITEMS_CH_DATA which can change the final internal table, structure RFPOSXEXT.

entry.title: Re: Modifying RFPOSXEXT Structure Fields in FBL3N Using BTE
entry.content: For standard fields don't use the old BTE, but use BAdI FI_ITEMS_CH_DATA which can change the final internal table, structure RFPOSXEXT.

entry.title: Re: Send PDF from SFTP adapter to HTTP via SAP CPI
entry.content: Hi Vikranth,

entry.title: Authorization für SAP Readiness Check Analysis
entry.content:
Hi

I am the user administrator for Deloitte Switzerland. A user wants access to the Readiness Check Analysis




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Authorization für SAP Readiness Check Analysis
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

S-user IDs must have the authorizations below to view and maintain data in the SAP Readiness Check application in SAP for Me, as outlined in KBA  3455928 - Authorizations required for the Readiness Check application - SAP for Me

  • Display SAP Readiness Check Analysis (RC_ANA_DIS)
    Enables S-users to view all SAP Readiness Check analyses belonging to the customer number associated with their user ID.

  • Manage SAP Readiness Check Analysis (RC_ANA_MGT)
    Enables S-users to create, edit, delete, and share all SAP Readiness Check analyses belonging to their customer number.

To grant the necessary authorizations to S-users, please refer to KBA 1511008 - How to add or change S-user ID authorizations - SAP for Me

Hope the above information is helpful to you.

Kind regards,
Judy

entry.title: Re: Send PDF from SFTP adapter to HTTP via SAP CPI
entry.content: Hi Vikranth, did you get the solution for this scenario, as i'm also getting 415 error

entry.title: Re: Condition contracts - vendor rebates
entry.content:
Hello Jonathan,

The final settlement will be used to close the contract and offset remaining accruals. To capture the incoming vendor invoice, you have to use t-code WB2R_DOC_ENTRY .

Regards,

Thorsten

entry.title: From SAP Business Suite to SAP Cloud ERP: Realizing the Strategy - AM
entry.content:
In this webcast, SAP expert will show you firsthand how the SAP Business Suite strategy is fully realized within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. We'll delve into how embedded AI technologies significantly enhance user productivity, showcasing practical use cases and outlining the exciting roadmap ahead.

You'll gain valuable insights into how the suite's comprehensive quality is designed to support and scale with your specific business growth requirements. This session is your opportunity to understand why SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is the perfect foundation for your digital transformation journey in this dynamic, technology-driven era.

entry.title: Re: No certification even after a week of exam and support ticket
entry.content: Over 2 weeks now. Still no certificate!

entry.title: Do we need additional licences for label printing in S4Hana Public cloud 2502 ?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are in process to deploy SAP WM on Public cloud 2502, where we want to have label printing enable for Handling Unit, Putaway, Picking, Shipping, 3PL labels etc. Do we need to go for additional licenses to enable label printing in WM public cloud 2502.

Please advise us best possible approach we can have for label printing in Public cloud.

Regards

XXXX

entry.title: Extended Sourcing for Public Sector for S/4 Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
I read about an "Extended Sourcing for Public Sector", that is announced for Q4 2025, in the SAP Industry Solution Portfolio website (ext. link) .

I would like to confirm if it will be available for S/4 Cloud Public Edition. There is an entry for S/4 (ext. link) and S/4 CLD Private (ext. link), but it does not mention S/4 CLD Public specifically.

Another question is what "S/4 PPS" stands for. Inside the links, it mentions "SAP Ariba Sourcing and Procurement for Public Sector in SAP S/4HANA", but it confuses me because it mentions both Ariba and S/4. I would like to know more about this solution, but I found nothing.

entry.title: Community, Purpose, and Technology Together!
entry.content:
Yesterday, the organizing team of SAP Inside Track Fortaleza had the privilege of visiting Associação Estação Luz, a non-profit organization based in Eusébio–CE that plays a vital role in our community.

Since 2004, Estação Luz has been transforming lives through social projects in education, culture, and sports, supporting children, teenagers, adults, and elderly people. Their work truly inspires us, showing how collective effort can change society.

As part of our commitment to social responsibility, SIT Fortaleza is proud to announce a partnership with Estação Luz. A portion of the event’s ticket sales will be donated to support their incredible work.

Even more special, the event’s closing moment will feature a musical presentation by the children of Estação Luz, who will bring their talent and joy to our community of SAP professionals.

This is more than an event; it’s about creating impact beyond technology.

Let’s connect, learn, share knowledge — and also contribute to a better future for our local community.

Join us at SAP Inside Track Fortaleza 2025 — technology with purpose!

#SAPCommunity #SITFortaleza #SAPInsideTrack #TechForGood #PurposeDriven #EstacaoLuz #Fortaleza #SAP

entry.title: Re: Working with RAP BO Events end-to-end - Event-driven-architecture - Event framework
entry.content:
Hi @AshishPandey 

Please note there is a difference between bloggers and helpers. Answering questions on the community is not part of my work. I am always happy to answer questions directly pertaining to my blogs, I want people to understand and potentially learn something, but more than that falls outside of what I do or have time to do. Thank you for your understanding.

Kind regards

entry.title: From SAP Business Suite to SAP Cloud ERP: Realizing the Strategy - PM
entry.content:
In this webcast, SAP expert will show you firsthand how the SAP Business Suite strategy is fully realized within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. We'll delve into how embedded AI technologies significantly enhance user productivity, showcasing practical use cases and outlining the exciting roadmap ahead.

You'll gain valuable insights into how the suite's comprehensive quality is designed to support and scale with your specific business growth requirements. This session is your opportunity to understand why SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is the perfect foundation for your digital transformation journey in this dynamic, technology-driven era.

entry.title: Re: Enable SAP BTP Remote Debugging to Diagnose CAPM Application on Node.js Stack
entry.content: I do not understand why it was necessary to try and provide a condensed version of the referenced blog. The original presents everything more than clearly enough.

entry.title: Re: Workflow approval via Integration Center
entry.content:
Hi @mithilapethe,

as mentioned before, you can do it via APIs, here is the link approveWfRequest | SAP Help Portal. Thought there is a limitation that you need to call approval APIs only behalf of the current approver of the workflow.

As a workaround you can add a step into wf with the dynamic group where you can put API user or change the approver as mentioned in the following article 2970678 - New OData Function Import changeWfRequestApprover - 2H 2020 SuccessFactors release - ECT-132722 - SAP for Me

Hope this helps.

Best regards,

Natalia

entry.title: Read data from the APP screen for editable fields without persisting the data.
entry.content:
Hi, I'm developing RAP UNMANAGED to generate a Fiori Elements app using List Report where I used standard PP CDSs for the order list and its components. In the custom CDS that I read from the Standard CDSs, I created a REASON field to insert a code. After that, the idea is to select the edited line with a new value in the REASON field and use an ACTION.

In the ACTION method, I'm not able to retrieve the data that was edited on the screen. The editable field is not persisted in any table. Is it possible to read the UI data at runtime? This REASON field does not need to be saved in any custom table because we only need it to execute the ACTION process.

Field:

The main question is whether RAP, whether UNMANAGED or MANAGED, can read data edited on the screen that does not need to be persisted in the database?

thanks

entry.title: HSN Code wise report SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

I need a query based report which gives output HSN wise summary report. 

HSNCode, Docentry with fields HSNCode , BaseAmt , IGSTAmt , SGSTAmt , CGStAmt, Tax %

 

SAP Business One #HSN #SAP B1

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Re: RDDIMPDP failed
entry.content: Maintain the client 000 in SCC4 if its not maintained. You may use se16n GD_EDIT, GD_SAPEDIT in debugger mode to update the table T000

entry.title: Re: Previous year's total cannot be displayed in SAC reports
entry.content:
Thank you for your confirmation. I apologize for my poor explanation,

but I would like the year-to-date amount from one year ago to be displayed in the year and month of the current fiscal year.

I would like to see the cumulative amount for FY2024 displayed in the FY2025 section of the measure “YTD Story” that you created.

In this case, I would like the YTDStory for FY2025 to show the amount for Measure “YTD Story” for FY2024.

I would like the amount 884633 to be displayed instead of the amount 9206895 and the amount 20126700 to be displayed in Q1 2025.

entry.title: Re: Planning Modernization
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing, @fkatzdobler !
I think this architecture is relevant for many BPC customers that are already on or about to embark on their journey to SAP Analytics Cloud as usually, there is a transition period of hybrid planning while some processes are already running in SAP Analytics Cloud and others are not transformed yet. In BDC, you can combine the data and with seamless planning, you shall be able to integrate the data product data into the planning models as well. 

BR
Max

entry.title: Re: Add SAP PI/PO Communication Channel Start/Stop Functionality to Your iFlows
entry.content:
Hello Craig, there is an existing request in Customer Influence for this feature: Need a solution to pause / resume interfaces in bulk for SAP Integration - Cloud Integration . We need a generic solution with a display / filter in a monitor to see in which IFlow with channels are stopped. In the monitor an action button is needed to "stop" or "start" selected chanels in IFlow. To have the right overview is very important for maintenace. In some cases we need to stop much IFlows. Please also note that IFlow can have more than two channels due to splits. The workaround is a good idea, but we use also SAP CI standard content and do not want to change this for this feature. The same point is the overview about start timer and temporary "stop" for maintenance. 

Kind regards, Steffen

entry.title: Re: Task list operation: component assignment (OSS note 4...
entry.content:
Hello there

It's been quite a while since I last used EWB-API. But CM_CL_S_COM_CHANGE should allow you to change component assignments. Make sure you run one of the CM_CL_S_COM_PROV* function modules first. I vaguely remember that there was also a ...RELOAD... function module that played a role. You've checked the sample program, right?

I noticed that you tagged this as EAM/PM. Are you sure you are using one of the supported task list types (N,S & Q)?

Regards
Jan

entry.title: Re: Shift identity management from SAP IDM to SAP IAG with CIS and GRC AC.
entry.content:
Thanks for the insight, Saurabh!!

I agree if SAP IDM is used just to perform risk analysis & provisioning into only the SAP system, then a blend of SAP CIS, IAG & GRC can replace it, accommodating complex scenarios.

Problems appear when you have complex scenarios, as in pending value or logical workflow or calculated provisioning into non-sap systems.

entry.title: Procurement: Sourcing SAC Business content installation Ariba Connection to SAC
entry.content:
Hi All,

Good day!!

I am trying to implement the Business content -> Procurement: Sourcing , which is based on the Ariba System.

I tried to check ways to connect Ariba and SAC but then I got to know that there are no straight forward ways even though it is business content.

Can anyone please help on how to consume this standard Ariba API to SAC? 

I got to know that it can be done using CPI but unfortunately I am not able to find any direct documentations which explains this for business content.

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

entry.title: Re: Adding Custom Fields to Standard Fiori App of S/4HANA
entry.content:
@Siva45 

Apologies for the delayed response.

If you still need it , I will handle it and send it to you .

entry.title: Can I build an Overview Page (OVP) with JSON data ?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I hope you're doing well. I have a question regarding SAP Fiori and SAP Business Application Studio (BAS).

I'm currently working on a custom application, and I would like to build an Overview Page (OVP). However, instead of using a traditional OData service with annotations (as OVP typically requires), I want to use static or dynamic JSON data as my data source.

My goals are:

  • To build an OVP-style UI (with cards/tiles displaying KPIs or summary information).

  • To use local or remote JSON data (e.g., from a JSON file or API).

  • To develop and test this in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS), possibly using freestyle SAPUI5.

My questions are:

  1. Is it possible to build an Overview Page (OVP) using only JSON data (without an OData service)?

  2. If so, are there any best practices or examples on how to bind JSON data to the cards on the OVP?

  3. Can I use mock data (e.g., mockserver) in BAS for this purpose?

  4. Is it necessary to use Fiori Elements, or can I achieve this with a freestyle UI5 application?

Any guidance, sample projects, or documentation links would be really appreciated.

Thanks in advance for your help!
